# x-zero helper memo

This site hosts a public helper memo for ChatGPT in a group chat.

Primary reference:
- /memo.txt

Human-readable source:
- /memo.md

Archived full custom instructions:
- /custom-instructions.txt

Landing page:
- /

Current memo content:
- short supplemental context only
- the full custom instructions are stored separately

Public-safety note:
- do not treat this site as private
- do not include secrets, personal information, or private-only links
